msg:
### Error querying database.  Cause: java.sql.SQLSyntaxErrorException: Unknown column 'visited_count' in 'field list'
### The error may exist in cn/edu/tjufe/zql/mapper/ArticleMapper.java (best guess)
### The error may involve defaultParameterMap
### The error occurred while setting parameters
### SQL: SELECT  id,article_id,user_id,category_id,article_title,article_content,visited_count,article_type,status,create_time,update_time,is_deleted  FROM T_Article      WHERE  (status = ?) ORDER BY visited_count DESC LIMIT 5
### Cause: java.sql.SQLSyntaxErrorException: Unknown column 'visited_count' in 'field list'
; bad SQL grammar []
